candidates.row_label: Total Revenue
candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Cost component, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Cost component, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenues/COGS
candidates.why: COGS, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Costs for launch of online sales
candidates.why: Operating cost, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the direct total revenue line from candidates.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct cost of sales / COGS line; best semantic match.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Only a component of COGS, not the full COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenues/COGS
candidates.why: Also a valid total COGS label, but appears duplicate of the more descriptive direct cost line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only a component of COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should not be selected over the reported line.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Preferred the direct reported COGS line over the duplicate-style alias 'Cost of Revenues/COGS'.

candidates.row_label: Selling and administrative expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and populated; per rules, select only this row when available.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Component within SG&A, but explicit SG&A total exists and is populated, so do not add components.

candidates.row_label: Other operating expenses
candidates.why: Possible overhead bucket, but explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Excluded for XSGA because D&A should not be included.

candidates.row_label: Selling and Administrative Expenses, Financial Services
candidates.why: Looks like a segment/supplemental row and is empty in preview; less appropriate than the main SG&A row.

variables.notes: Used the explicit SG&A line only, consistent with the hierarchy rule. Excluded D&A components.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of intangible assets - capitalized IT-development integrated IT-platform
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized development costs is not current-period R&D expense; not a valid XRD mapping.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense line is present in the provided statements. Candidate refers to amortization, which should not be used for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses for external financing
candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses for leases
candidates.why: Interest-related, but narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Other financial expenses
candidates.why: Finance expense but broader/less precise than interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest item; narrower and less preferable than the main interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Financial income and other similar income statement items Financial expenses and other similar income statement items
candidates.why: Mixed/unclear finance line, not a clean interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Financial expenses and other similar income statement items
candidates.why: Broader finance expense line; acceptable fallback if direct interest expense unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Financial expenses and other similar income-statement items - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should not be selected.

final_choice.row_label: Financial expenses and other similar income statement items

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list: prefer the direct interest expense line first, then broader finance expense if needed, then lease interest as a narrower fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Equity
candidates.why: Valid equity line, but less preferred than parent/owner-only equity because BE should exclude NCI if possible.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Total equity and liabilities
candidates.why: Total balance sheet size, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the preferable owner-only equity line. Selected 'Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders' from the sheet because BE should exclude non-controlling interests when possible. Manual review flagged only because this choice is outside the provided candidates. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line appears in the provided Balance Sheet, and total equity equals parent equity in all shown years.
